run_summary.summary: ⚠️ Brandi cannot scan Gmail — the OAuth refresh token has expired or been revoked. No emails have been read and no deals have been updated since Apr 28. Action required: re-authorize Brandi's Gmail access to resume scheduled scanning.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth refresh token invalid (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: Brandi's Gmail access has been broken since ~Apr 28 (nearly 2 months). She can't see any new brand emails or update the pipeline until the OAuth token is refreshed. Please re-authorize Gmail access from the settings where Brandi was originally connected.
